steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content: We need to convert 22,704 yards per hour to miles per hour. Given that 1 mile = 1,760 yards, we divide the speed in yards by 1,760 to get the speed in miles.

steps.title: Calculate the speed in miles per hour
steps.content:
$$\frac{22,704}{1,760} = 12.9$$
The average speed is 12.9 miles per hour.
